/ B.Tech / Top Engineering Colleges in India
Updated on Apr 8, 2026 13:28 IST

Tasbiya KhanSenior Executive

Top Engineering Colleges in India 2026: Ranking, Fees, Courses, Admission, Placements

India is home to 290+ top Engineering colleges, ranked under NIRF 2025. Of these, 170+ are privately owned, 100+ are owned by the government and 2 colleges are owned by semi-government institutions. The top NIRF-ranked Engineering colleges are IIT Madras, IIT Delhi, IIT Bombay, etc. Admissions are based on popular entrance exams like JEE Main and JEE Advanced, AP EAMCET and MHT CET. 

Table of Contents
  1. Important Highlights of the Top Engineering Colleges in India 2026
  2. Top 10 Engineering Colleges in India based on NIRF Ranking 2025
  3. Eligibility Criteria for Admission in Engineering in India after Class 12th
  4. Tier 1 Engineering Colleges in India: Exam Schedules 2026
  5. Top-Ranked Private Engineering Colleges in India 
  6. Government Engineering Colleges in India
  7. Courses Offered by Engineering Colleges in India
  8. Top Private Engineering Colleges in India: Tuition Fee Vs Placement Package Offered
  9. Top Engineering Colleges in India under INR 1 lakh
  10. Most Popular Specialisations offered by Tier 1 Engineering Colleges in India

Important Highlights of the Top Engineering Colleges in India 2026

Among the consistent top 10 Engineering colleges in India, based on NIRF 2025, IIT Madras on top, and some other IITs across India, followed by National Institute of Technology.

To get into BTech colleges in India that are top ranking, it's better to have an overview of the fees, the types of public vs private institutions with their fee brackets, the common entrance tests for BTech. The table below mentioned the detailed highlights -  

Parameters

Statistics

No. of Top Engineering Colleges in India

23 IITs

25 IIITs

31 NITs

Fee Ranges for Top Engg Colleges in India based on NIRF Rankings 

Less than INR 1 lakh: 10+

INR 1 - 2 Lakhs: 15+

INR 2 - 3 Lakhs: 40+

INR 3 - 5 Lakhs: 30+

More than INR 5 Lakhs: 170+

Top Engineering Colleges in India (Based on NIRF, India Today, The Week, Times) 
  • IIT Madras
  • IIT Delhi
  • IIT Bombay, etc.

Tuition fee range of top ranked Engineering colleges

~ INR 20,000 - INR 26 lakh 

Accepted Entrance Exams Top Colleges for Engg in India 

JEE Main, JEE Advanced, KCET, CUET

Cities of Top Engineering Colleges in India 

Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bangalore, Pilani, Pune

Disclaimer: This information is from the official sources but can vary. 

Predict your chances here: Engineering Cutoff Predictor

Top 10 Engineering Colleges in India based on NIRF Ranking 2025

The NIRF ranks institutions across categories based on teaching, research, placements, diversity, and public perception. For engineering institutes, the weightage tends to be higher for research and teaching quality. These top 10 engineering colleges in India are all national institutes of importance, and only a few have shifted positions over the last three years, with IIT Madras being the exception, scoring 95 out of 100 in the teaching and learning resources parameter. Have a look below.

College Name NIRF 2023 NIRF 2024 NIRF 2025
IIT Madras Ranking 1 1 1
IIT Delhi Ranking 2 2 2
IIT Bombay Ranking 3 3 3
IIT Kanpur Ranking 4 4 4
IIT Kharagpur Ranking 6 5 5
IIT Roorkee Ranking 5 6 6
IIT Hyderabad Ranking 8 8 7
IIT Guwahati Ranking 7 7 8
NIT Tiruchirapalli 9 9 9
IIT BHU Varanasi Ranking 15 10 10

Disclaimer: This information is from official sources, which can change at a later date. 

Eligibility Criteria for Admission in Engineering in India after Class 12th

The basic eligibility for the best BTech colleges in India is as follows:

  • Candidates must pass Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics in the Class 12 exam from a recognised Indian board.
  • For the top IITs in India, it requires a minimum of 75% aggregate.
  • For general engineering colleges, most state and private universities require a minimum of 45% to 50% aggregate in PCM subjects. 
  • Must appear for exams like JEE Main and Advanced, or check state-level entrances like MHT CET for engineering colleges in Mumbai, and other university-specific entrance exams.

Total Tuition Fee

Annual Average Package

Low-cost Colleges Tuition Fee

Most Popular Specialisations offered by Tier 1 Engineering Colleges in India

Engineering colleges in India offer diversified specialisations in CSE, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics, and Communication Engineering, and so on. The most popular ones are Computer Science Engineering and Mechanical Engineering followed by Civil Engineering.

Commonly asked questions
On Top Engineering Colleges in India 2026: Ranking, Fees, Courses, Admission, Placements
Q:   Which is the No. 1 top ranked Engineering college in India?
A: 

As per NIRF ranking 2025,  IIT Madras emerged on the 1st position followed by IIT Delhi and IIT Bombay. Listed below are some of the top Engineering colleges in India along with their NIRF ranking 2025:

College NameNIRF 2023NIRF 2024NIRF 2025
IIT Madras Ranking111
IIT Delhi Ranking222
IIT Bombay Ranking333
IIT Kanpur Ranking444
IIT Kharagpur Ranking655
IIT Roorkee Ranking566
IIT Hyderabad Ranking887
IIT Guwahati Ranking778
NIT Tiruchirapalli999
IIT BHU Varanasi Ranking151010

Disclaimer: This information is sourced from the official website of the ranking body listed and may vary.

Q:   How good are the BTech placements at BITS Pilani?
A: 

BTech is the most sought out after course of BITS Pilani. The course-wise placement stats are yet to be released on the offcial website of BITS Pilani. However, BITS Pilani recorded 62.57%% placements for First Degree (FD) courses in the academic year 2024-2025. Check out the key highlights of the overall BITS Pilani placements for the Class of 2024 and 2025 in the table below:

Particulars

Placement Statistics (2024)

Placement Statistics (2025)

Average Package (Domestic)

INR 19.70 LPA

INR 31.63 LPA

Median Package (Domestic)

INR 16.15 LPA

360

80.03%

54.35%

Note: The placement data for 2025 batch has been taken from the media reports. It may vary once the final placement report is out. 

Q:   Is JEE Main enough for BITS Pilani BTech admission?
A: 

No, BITS Pilani doesn't accept JEE Main scores for admission to the BE course. Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani BE admission is based on valid BITSAT scores. Selection is based entirely on the candidate's past academic record, specialisation preference, availability of seats and score in BITSAT. Candidates, who have passed Class 12 in 2022 are only eligible to appear in 2023 and are eligible to apply for the BITS Pilani BE course. Apart from the BITSAT scores, students are also required to fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements.

View other answers
Q:   How many top ranked Engineering colleges in India?
A: 

Among India's top Engineering colleges are 23 IITs, 31 NITs, and 25 IIITs. About 100+ engineering colleges are owned by the government, while 170+ colleges are privately owned and 2 colleges are owned by semi-government institutions. JEE Main and JEE Advanced are the top entrance exams for admission to top engineering colleges in India. IIT Madras, IIT Delhi, IIT Bombay, IIT Kanpur, and IIT Roorkee are the best Engineering colleges in India. According to the NIRF rankings of 2025,  IIT Madras emerged as India's No. 1 engineering college.

Commonly asked questions
On Top Engineering Colleges in India 2026: Ranking, Fees, Courses, Admission, Placements
Q:   What JEE rank is required to get CSE admission in Thapar University?
A: 
Thapar University CSE cutoff 2024 was 54620 for the General AI category students for admission. The first-round cutoff for the same stood at 32664. So, considering the 2024 JEE Main ranks, students aiming for CSE admission at TIET must target to secure a rank up to 54620 in case they belong to the General category in the AI quota. For other categories and courses, the JEE Main cutoff ranks will be different. Tabulated below is the TIET BE cutoff 2024 for CSE admission for different categories in the AI quota: 
CategoryJEE Main Last Round Cutoff 2024
General54620
SC294428
ST357281

Note: For OBC, EWS and PWD categories, the cutoff ranks were not released.

A: 

The salary package recorded during TIET placements 2024 and previous two years is mentioned below: 

Particulars

Placement Statistics 2022

Placement Statistics 2023

Placement Statistics 2024

Highest package

INR 40 LPA

INR 55.75 LPA

INR 123 LPA

Average package

INR 10.38 LPA

INR 11.73 LPA

INR 11.25 LPA

Median package

INR 9.5 LPA

INR 11.5 LPA

INR 10 LPA

Q:   What was the average package offered to BTech CSE students at VIT Vellore?
A: 

The VIT Vellore CSE average package is yet to be released on the official website. However, the overall VIT Vellore average package offered during the 2024 placement drive stood at INR 9.90 LPA. The same is tabulated below:

Particulars

Placement Statistics (2024)

Average package

INR 9.90  LPA

Q:   What are the top ranked government Tier-1 Engineering colleges in India?
A: 

Given below are the top ranked government tier-1 Engineering colleges in India with tuition fees and NIRF ranking 2025 -

Public/Government Colleges

Total Tuition Fee

NIRF Ranking 2025

IIT Madras Admission

INR 10 lakh

1

IIT Delhi Admission

INR 8 lakh

2

IIT Bombay Admission

INR 8 lakh

3

IIT Kanpur Admission

INR 8 lakh

4

IIT Kharagpur Admission

INR 8 lakh

5

Q:   How many seats are there in IITs?
A: 

According to the JoSAA 2024 seat matrix, the total seats in IITs are 17760, while the number of seats in NITs and IIITs is 24229 and 8546, respectively. According to the official data, this year 355 seats are increased in IIT, including 20 in IIT Bhubaneswar, 12 in IIT Bombay, 30 in Kharagpur, 84 in Patna, 30 in Gandhinagar, 10 in Guwahati, 40 in Bhilai, 10 in Tirupati, and 75 in Dharwad. In 2023, the IIT seat count was 17385.

Q:   Is SRM Kattankulathur costly to study BTech?
A: 

Being a private institute, SRM Kattankulathur offers several hostel facilities and basic amenities at a cost ranging from INR 1 Lakh to INR 2.5 Lakh. Besides this, the course tuition fees and SRM Kattankulathur ranges from INR 11 Lakh to INR 23.8 Lakh. The affordability range is subjective to each candidate.

Commonly asked questions
On Top Engineering Colleges in India 2026: Ranking, Fees, Courses, Admission, Placements
Q:   Is it easy to get into VIT Vellore for BTech course?
A: 

Admission to the VIT Vellore B.Tech course is based on the VITEEE score. VIT Engineering Entrance Exam is a computer-based test conducted for a duration of 2 hours and 30 minutes. The VITEEE question paper consists of 125 questions. The questions will be based on Maths, Physics, Chemistry, English and Aptitude. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute. 

View other answers
Q:   Is it worth joining the top ranked Engineering colleges in India?
A: 

Enrolling in top ranked Engineering colleges in India can be worthwhile for you. For that, you need to check its ROI. Listed below are some colleges along with their tuition fees and average placement package:

Top Colleges

Total Tuition Fee

Annual Average Package

IIT Madras Courses

INR 8 lakh

INR 19 LPA

NIT Delhi Courses

INR 20 LPA

IIT Kanpur Courses

INR 8 lakh

INR 23 LPA

IIT Roorkee Courses

INR 8 lakh

INR 17 LPA

NIT Tiruchirapalli Courses

INR 5 lakh

INR 12 LPA

IIT Hyderabad Courses

INR 8 lakh

INR 21 LPA

Disclaimer: The above statistics are based on the latest available data.
